title: astragalus gilviflorus
intro: Astragalus gilviflorus, also known as the yellow-flowered milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus gilviflorus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the body's natural defense against infection. Astragalus gilviflorus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
